appDescription.message: New tab page showing your GitHub PRs, reviews, and unread comments

setupSubtitle.message: Replace your new tab with a live view of your pull requests.

setupFeatureReviewsDesc.message: PRs waiting for your review, ranked by how long they've been waiting

setupFeatureYourPrsDesc.message: Unresponded feedback, changes requested, and stale PRs surfaced first

setupFeaturePersonalDesc.message: All open PRs across your repos and orgs in one place

setupPrivacy.message: Your token stays on this device. It is never synced or sent anywhere except the GitHub API.

logoutConfirmDesc.message: This will remove your GitHub token and all settings from this device.

helpReviewRequested.message: Open PRs where someone requested your review. Sorted by urgency — unstarted reviews and older PRs float to the top.

helpYourPrs.message: PRs you authored. Unresponded reviewer feedback and changes requested are surfaced first. Draft PRs are scored lower.

helpPersonal.message: All open PRs in your personal repos and any additional orgs you configured in settings. PRs already shown in the other columns are excluded.

emptyState.message: No open PRs. Go touch some grass.

settingsOrgHint.message: Add orgs to see all their open PRs and control their sort order. Drag to reorder — PRs are grouped by org in this order. Work orgs don't need to be here — your authored and review-requested PRs show up automatically. Orgs not in this list appear last, sorted alphabetically.

settingsOrgColorsHint.message: Customise badge colours for orgs that appear on your dashboard.

discoveredOrgsHint.message: These orgs appeared from your review requests and authored PRs.

setupFailed.message: Setup failed. Check the console for details.

tokenScopes.message: Token doesn’t have the right permissions. Make sure Repository access is set to “All repositories” and Pull requests permission is “Read”.

errorGitHub.message: GitHub is having issues right now. Hit refresh to try again, or just open a new tab in a bit.

errorRateLimit.message: GitHub rate limit hit. The dashboard will work again in a few minutes.

errorAuth.message: Your token seems invalid or expired. Try clearing it (logout button) and setting up a new one.

errorNetwork.message: Can’t reach GitHub. Check your internet connection and try again.

errorScopes.message: Your token doesn’t have enough permissions. Try clearing it (logout button) and creating a new one with “All repositories” access and Pull requests (read) permission.

errorGeneric.message: Something went wrong loading your PRs. Hit refresh to try again.
